name: clean-code
description: Write readable, maintainable code through disciplined naming, small functions, and clean error handling. Use when the user mentions "code review", "naming conventions", "function too long", "code smells", "readable code", "boy scout rule", "single responsibility", or "unit test quality". Also trigger when reviewing pull requests for readability, refactoring messy functions, debating comment styles, or improving error handling patterns. Covers SRP, comment discipline, formatting, and unit testing
author: wondelai
summary_zh: 帮你写出可读易维护代码的实践规范，专治函数过长、命名随意和错误处理混乱等代码坏味道，特别适合在代码审查、重构烂代码或提升单测质量时参考。
